ACTUATOR_NOT_CONTRACTED.description: Actuator target is not contracted/allowlisted for this workspace/principal.

ACTUATOR_CMD_NOT_ALLOWED.description: Command is not allowed for the contracted actuator target under the active baseline.

ARMING_REQUIRED.description: Physical actuation requires explicit arming/approval under policy (control-plane gated).

SAFETY_WINDOW_VIOLATION.description: Command violates safety window or interlock constraints; escalation/quarantine is required.
